packages.name: @rannta-crosschain/core
packages.responsibility: network, asset, route, receipt, replay, state, and capability foundation

packages.name: @rannta-crosschain/warp
packages.responsibility: intent, route graph, quote normalization, ranking, provider abstraction, and execution planning

packages.name: @rannta-crosschain/bridge
packages.responsibility: canonical RNTX to wRNTX bridge accounting, receipts, replay, recovery, treasury, TON, and X-Chain boundaries

packages.name: @rannta-crosschain/gateway
packages.responsibility: typed local control-plane, route, capability, receipt, health, monitoring, and owner-control interfaces
